    fileTask(Path) - Method in class iu.logging.internal.IuLogHandler
    Subscribes to log messages, and writes each to log files.
    flush() - Method in class iu.logging.internal.IuLogHandler
     
    flush() - Method in class iu.logging.internal.LogFilePublisher
    Synchronously writes all buffered data to the log file.
    flushFiles() - Method in class iu.logging.internal.IuLogHandler
    Synchronously flushes all file publisher buffers and related log files.
    follow(LogContext, String, UnsafeSupplier) - Static method in class iu.logging.internal.ProcessLogger
    Retrieves a value from an UnsafeSupplier using the provided LogContext bound to the current thread.
    follow(Object, String, Object) - Static method in class iu.logging.Bootstrap
    Proxy method for ProcessLogger.follow(LogContext, String, UnsafeSupplier).
    format() - Method in class iu.logging.internal.IuLogEvent
    Formats the log message as human-readable.

    Gets an external proxy to the active log context.

    Ensures that logging is fully initialized for the system and platform ClassLoaders.

    Initializes attributes for the current thread's context.

    Formats a Duration

    isDevelopment() - Method in interface iu.logging.LogEnvironment
    Determines whether or not to enable extended debug logging appropriate for development environments.
    iu.logging - package iu.logging
     
    iu.util.logging.impl - module iu.util.logging.impl
    Per-context configurable base logging module.
    IuLogEvent - Class in iu.logging.internal
    Fully resolved buffered log event holder.
    IuLogEvent(LogRecord) - Constructor for class iu.logging.internal.IuLogEvent
    Constructor.
    IuLoggingProxy - Class in iu.logging.internal
    Proxy from an external interface to an implementation class that follows the same contract.
    IuLogHandler - Class in iu.logging.internal
    Efficiently handles writing log output for IU JEE application components.
    IuLogHandler() - Constructor for class iu.logging.internal.IuLogHandler
    Constructor
    IuLogHandler.FilePublisherKey - Class in iu.logging.internal
    Key type for use with IuLogHandler.filePublishers.

    L

    LogContext - Interface in iu.logging
    Provides thread-bound context information for log events.
    LogEnvironment - Interface in iu.logging
    Provides environment-bound context attributes.
    LogEnvironmentImpl - Class in iu.logging.internal
    LogContext to fall back on, by context, when none is active on the current thread.
    LogEnvironmentImpl() - Constructor for class iu.logging.internal.LogEnvironmentImpl
    Default constructor
    LogEnvironmentImpl(LogEnvironmentImpl, String, boolean, String, String, String, String, String, String) - Constructor for class iu.logging.internal.LogEnvironmentImpl

    Publishes log messages to files.

    Constructor.

    M

    memoryToString(long, long, long) - Static method in class iu.logging.internal.ProcessLogger
    Formats runtime memory stats for printing with the process trace.

    P

    ProcessLogger - Class in iu.logging.internal
    Tracks log messages by bounded execution context.
    publish(String) - Method in class iu.logging.internal.LogFilePublisher
    Publishes a formatted message to the log file.
    publish(LogRecord) - Method in class iu.logging.internal.IuLogHandler
     
    purge() - Method in class iu.logging.internal.IuLogHandler
    Purges log events from the queue.
    purgeTask() - Method in class iu.logging.internal.IuLogHandler
    Repeatedly invokes IuLogHandler.purge in a loop as long as this instance is open.

    R

    resolvePath(Path, String...) - Static method in class iu.logging.internal.IuLogHandler
    Resolves a path relative to a given root, with characters that could potentially corrupt file names (: and /) stripped out.
    rotate() - Method in class iu.logging.internal.LogFilePublisher
    Rotates log files.

    S

    sizeToString(long) - Static method in class iu.logging.internal.ProcessLogger
    Prints a size in bytes rounded to largest non-zero unit.
    subscribe() - Method in class iu.logging.internal.IuLogHandler
    Subscribes to log events.
    subscribe(Class) - Static method in class iu.logging.Bootstrap
    Subscribes to log events via proxy to a remotely defined interface.

    trace(Supplier) - Static method in class iu.logging.Bootstrap
    Adds a message to the process trace without logging.
    trace(Supplier) - Static method in class iu.logging.internal.ProcessLogger
    Adds a message to the active process trace without logging.
